name: QDOT Hardship Distribution Exemption

eligibility.description: The distribution must meet the regulatory definition of 'hardship' to avoid the section 2056A(b)(1) tax.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts distributions from a QDOT to a surviving spouse from the deferred estate tax if the distribution is made on account of hardship.
